name: Kopy Goldfields AB (publ)
summary: Kopy Goldfields AB (publ) operates as a gold exploration and production company in Russia. The company holds interests in 12 licenses covering an area of approximately 2,156 square kilometers located in the Lena Goldfields of Siberia and in the Amur Region of the Russian Far East. Its flagship project is the Krasny project that consists of three licenses with a total area of 119 square kilometers. The company is headquartered in Stockholm, Sweden.
